_readme: E2b INVENTORY-EXTENSION DESIGN assumption block, ids ASM-2250..2259 (10 entries) — EMITTED by the Fable design agent designer-8 (2026-07-13, maintainer-approved issue #29) for central registration by the coordinator WITH THE COMMIT; registry/assumptions.jsonl is NOT touched by this pass (no git actions, design-role constraint).

RANGE STATUS at emission: verified free by repo-wide grep at emission — ASM ids in use are <= 2239 plus the reserved 2270..2278 block (asm-f1k-freeze); 2240..2269 unreferenced, 2250..2259 taken here. The coordinator may remap with a note per the ASM-2117 precedent.

SCOPE: this block records the E2b DESIGN ADDENDUM (docs/next/design/engine-inference-under-typing.md §E2b): the mechanical benchmark-blind lemma-selection rule E2b-SEL, its measured output (10 lemmas), the sense-minting rule and the 22 staged concepts (data/kernel-v1-e2b-staging/, OUTSIDE kernel-v1), and the re-extraction/custody plan. It adopts NO anomaly-gold construct (hard-vs-defeasible remains maintainer decision #29), runs NO engine, computes NO outcome, modifies NO frozen record, and states NO feasibility conclusion on CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY. Tags: MEASURED | DERIVED | STIPULATED | EXTRAPOLATION.

assumptions.claim: E2B SCOPE AND CUSTODY: E2b is executed as a DESIGN + AUTHORING pass only. The selection script poc/engine-inference/e2b-inventory-extension/e2b_select_lemmas.py consumes ONLY pinned third-party bytes (the E2a VerbNet 3.3 zip sha-verified fail-closed, WN 3.1 dict bytes + pinned extraction jsonl, the E2a selrestr-side-table.json, and the kernel-v0/v1 manifests for the exclusion list); it NEVER opens SemCor sentence files, holdout/items-h.json, gold-h.json, results/*, rows.jsonl, orbit-rows.jsonl, run-result.json, or any outcome artifact, and imports no engine/scorer (asserted mechanically at exit, the extract_holdout.py discipline). The staged concepts live in data/kernel-v1-e2b-staging/ — kernel-v1 proper and its frozen surface proof are untouched; identity minting (urn:kot:) and FrameNet licensing are deferred to the adoption build; adoption is a maintainer decision that follows the #29 construct sign-off. No decision rule of the frozen-track design (§2-§4: EP-A/EP-B, exact census, C-SHUF gate value, DIST-SPAN, no-net-harm, kill criteria, claim ladder) is changed by E2b.
assumptions.rationale: The steering synthesis and E2a both bound E2b to land AFTER the outcome-blind construct diagnostic and BEFORE any construct adoption; encoding the custody as forbidden-input lists, module-import assertions, and a staging directory outside the frozen corpus makes design-only status checkable, not promised.

assumptions.claim: E2B-SEL RULE (mechanical, benchmark-blind, constants fixed in the script before any output existed): F0 single-token alphabetic VerbNet member lemma present in pinned WN 3.1 index.verb; F1 lemma not in Stage-A {break,find,friend,make}, not a PC-6 decoy {cut,draw,hold}, not a kernel-v0 panel lemma (mechanical from the two manifests) — so every selected lemma's cells are fresh w.r.t. every seen frame by construction; F2 >=1 VN-restricted synset (non-'?' member sense key resolved via pinned index.sense; undergoer role = second NP of the nearest 'NP V NP' frame, E2a M2; side via the pinned E2a side table and combination logic, M3; all-side-entailing-classes-agree, M4) with tag_cnt >= T_RESTRICTED=5; F3 polysemy >=2 verb synsets with tag_cnt >= T_CONTRAST=2; F4 within-lemma sortal differentiation — another frequent synset with (a) VN required side opposite the top restricted synset's, else (b) a parsed WN gloss-example object on the opposite side (pinned ASM-1991 parse + noun_side; gloss bytes of non-Stage-A lemmas were never extracted). Ranking: per required-side bucket by restricted tag_cnt desc then lemma asc, <=5 per bucket, floor 6 / cap 10, pinned relaxation ladder (T_RESTRICTED->3, T_CONTRAST->1, drop F4(b)) applied in order only on shortfall and logged. DISCLOSURE: tag_cnt is the SemCor-derived frequency aggregate shipped inside the pinned WN 3.1 bytes — a frequency steer toward holdout yield, not outcome information; it is the identical field the design already consumes (ASM-1993 D-word-dom dominance; ASM-2110). The E2a mapping helpers are imported byte-identically, so the selection's restriction semantics and any future #29-admitted O2 construct share one implementation.
assumptions.rationale: The steering synthesis requires the E2b extension to be 'mechanical, pre-registered' and benchmark-blind; fixing filters, thresholds, quotas, exclusions, and a relaxation ladder in the committed script before the first run leaves no discretionary joint in WHICH lemmas extend the inventory, and reusing the E2a mapping bytes removes a second implementation that could drift.

assumptions.claim: E2B-SEL OUTPUT (double-run byte-identical; e2b-selection.json): 109 candidate lemmas passed all filters; the quota selected 10 — phys bucket: add (mix-22.1-2 Patient [+concrete], v-00182551 tag 116), bring (bring-11.3-1 Theme [+concrete], v-02081903 tag 122 + v-01435927 tag 19), fight (meet-36.3-2 Co-Agent [+animate], v-01092746 tag 112), leave (escape-51.1-1-1 Initial_Location [+concrete], v-02013448 tag 146 + v-02019450 tag 20), run (carry-11.4/run-51.3.2-2-1 [+concrete], v-01930264 tag 106 + v-02079296 tag 38; PLUS its own abst-restricted conduct-111.1 sense v-02448714 tag 20); abst bucket: conduct (conduct-111.1 Theme [+eventive], v-02450374 tag 44), cry (manner_speaking-37.3 Topic [+communication], v-00914001 tag 11), produce (engender-27.1 Theme [+abstract], v-01756692 tag 26), shape (engender-27.1 [+abstract], v-00702806 tag 11), sing (manner_speaking-37.3 [+communication], v-01734912 tag 46). No relaxation-ladder step was needed. Contrast senses and F4 evidence per the §E2b.3 table; run's differentiation is internal (phys- and abst-restricted senses in one lemma).
assumptions.rationale: Recording the measured selection with classes, roles, restrictions, tag counts, and evidence makes the extension auditable against the rule rather than taken on trust, and gives the coordinator the exact synset scope the adoption build and re-extraction must match.

assumptions.claim: E2B MINTING RULE: per selected lemma, mint one sense concept for (a) every VN-restricted synset passing F2 and (b) the F4 contrast synset; synsets sharing one VN class, one required side, and one explication schema may cluster into a single concept (the break.interrupt precedent — exercised once: leave.depart covers v-02013448 + v-02019450); all other synsets of the lemma go to excludedSenses (R4/R5 scope closure — a concept claims its synset cluster, not the word, ASM-1884). The SemCor-dominant synset of every selected lemma is verified to lie inside (a) u (b) at build time, so D-word-dom dominance stays within the minted set. ONTOLOGY RULE, enforced by the build: every minted verb sense concept is ontic_category 'event' in the ck-ufo sidecar — the Stage-A maintainer clause ('a breakage, in any sense, is an event, never a material entity') generalized to all E2b lemmas; no E2b concept may be typed endurant/relator.
assumptions.rationale: The minting scope must be as mechanical as the lemma selection so the extension cannot smuggle hand-picked senses; the event rule prevents the ontology error class the Stage-A build gated with ERR_BREAK_NOT_EVENT from re-entering through new lemmas.
assumptions.backing_ref: data/kernel-v1-e2b-staging/build-e2b-staging.mjs sha256:683175005460a1a6662e577b7bdd79d05c2cf3bbaac2b2ce50b322a7d5f2c8eb (SCOPE + ONTIC gates); data/kernel-v1-e2b-staging/typing/ck-ufo-sidecar.jsonl sha256:1690344ea77a4b8944b88bb3fbe40f7610ae8c0bbe244e1e0578d144146e0168; data/kernel-v1/README.md gate list (ERR_BREAK_NOT_EVENT precedent)

assumptions.claim: STAGED CORPUS CENSUS: 22 sense concepts over the 10 selected lemmas (add 2, bring 3, conduct 2, cry 2, fight 2, leave 2, produce 2, run 3, shape 2, sing 2) emitted to data/kernel-v1-e2b-staging/{concepts/,sense-index/,typing/,manifest.json}; every explication passes the encoder's validateExplication and one encodeConceptSet pass with the encoder pin READ-only equal to kernel-v0's frozen encoderContentHash 40e8c8ba4c3d081c5051ea62d946d2ee9ee9f3205853b5c377a4c1e647e2d10c (no encoder change, no ALGORITHM_VERSION bump, no X0 golden regeneration); the SCOPE gate verified minted synsets == E2b-SEL output per lemma; G1/G2 verified no synset claimed twice; sense-index files carry the full excludedSenses closure per lemma (e.g. run: 41 candidates, 3 minted concepts, 38 excluded). Concept ids are alias URNs urn:kernel-v1e2b:<lemma>.<senseTag>, identity minting deferred to adoption.
assumptions.rationale: The census plus fail-closed build gates make the staged corpus reproducible and checkable byte-for-byte before the maintainer decides adoption, and prove encodability now so adoption is a re-mint rather than a re-authoring.
assumptions.backing_ref: data/kernel-v1-e2b-staging/manifest.json sha256:38e67bcd60f6adb2e5970e8895f6b5026ad5aa7722230c20cb746be033e1f589; build output {ok:true, concepts:22, all_validated:true, all_events:true}

assumptions.claim: EXPLICATION -> AXIOM PROMOTION CONVENTION FOR E2B (what the §1.2 module build will read): every RESTRICTED sense's explication carries an undergoer-sort clause on its own required side — phys via locational/kinetic capability clauses (BE-SOMEWHERE / MOVE / body-part participation; SomeoneRef or PlaceRef referent kinds), abst via NOT(CAN(BE-SOMEWHERE Y)), BE-SPEC(Y, WORDS) (the break.violate pattern), or eventive HAPPEN(Y) clauses; CONTRAST senses may stay sortally broad (breadth is what makes the K-lemma-union collapse drop constraints — the EP-A mechanism). The promotion itself remains the §1.2 disclosed experimental stipulation, an explicator authoring act at module build with per-axiom clause citations; any NEW bridge class must be a minted classDeclaration anchored on the WN31 physical_entity/abstraction top split with disjointWith pairs, exactly like the existing vocabulary; the soft-type sidecar remains unconsumed (its binding:false contract stands).
assumptions.rationale: Pinning which clause shapes license which range sides BEFORE the axiom module is authored keeps the promotion auditable and prevents the module build from back-fitting axioms to whatever the holdout later needs; it also documents that the staged explications already carry the load-bearing clauses.
assumptions.backing_ref: engine-inference-under-typing.md §1.2, §E2b.4; data/kernel-v1-e2b-staging/concepts/*.json notes fields (per-concept undergoer-sort clause named); ASM-1952

assumptions.claim: RE-EXTRACTION AND CUSTODY PLAN (outcomes unknown at freeze, kept so): (1) E2b lemmas enter via a separate extended-inventory constant, re-pinned at freeze; Stage-A LEMMAS and decoys unchanged. (2) Pre-freeze, ONLY the outcome-free extractors run for the extended inventory (gloss-example items + SemCor holdout items-H'/gold-H', both sha-pinned without computing any outcome); the KILL-e1 recount is evaluated from pinned items alone at $0. (3) THE E2A LESSON MADE A RULE: no anomaly item of any E2b synset is ever compiled or executed outside the confirmatory frame — anomaly construction for E2b synsets happens exactly once, inside the pinned holdout extraction; pilot checks needing anomaly mechanics use Stage-A frames and PC-6 decoys only; the pilot entrypoint mechanically asserts its item list contains no (E2b synset, anomaly) pair; the frozen runner's refuse-if-H-rows-exist assertion covers all H' ids unchanged. (4) Decontamination and the H* novel-cell restriction apply unchanged; every E2b cell is novel by construction (F1). (5) The KILL-e1 recount is reported under BOTH the pinned H2 hard-unanimity construct and the VerbNet-defeasible amendment (E2a mechanics), thresholds unchanged (>=30 items, >=12 cells, >=2 ops, >=2 lemmas); the freeze proceeds only if the count under the maintainer-admitted #29 construct passes, and a shortfall stops the freeze at $0 rather than weakening the record.
assumptions.rationale: E2a proved that a deterministic instrument burns cells the moment an exploratory execution realizes them — the only two VerbNet-licensable cells died exactly that way; quarantining E2b anomaly construction inside the pinned holdout extraction is the structural fix, and dual-construct recount keeps the design valid whichever way the maintainer decides #29.
assumptions.backing_ref: engine-inference-under-typing.md §E2b.5, §2.5 custody items (1)-(5); ASM-2104/2105/2135 (custody mechanics); ASM-2176/2177 (the burned-cell mechanism); holdout/holdout-manifest.json .kill_e1.thresholds

assumptions.claim: C-SHUF ORBIT GROWTH RULE (extends ASM-2114 in the large direction; the small-direction Monte-Carlo rule for |Orbit| < 20 already exists): on the extended inventory the within-lemma permutation orbit is |Orbit| = 960 x (2!)^8 x (3!)^2 = 8,847,360 (Stage-A 5-2-2-2; E2b eight 2-sense lemmas and two 3-sense lemmas — add 2, bring 3, conduct 2, cry 2, fight 2, leave 2, produce 2, run 3, shape 2, sing 2), so full enumeration stops being CPU-trivial. Pinned rule: if |Orbit| > 10^4, C-SHUF uses B = 9,999 uniform within-lemma permutations drawn with a seed fixed at freeze, plus the identity; p = (1 + #{b : T(pi_b) >= T(K)}) / (B + 1) (minimum attainable p = 1/10,000); the orbit-invariant A_union frame (§2.3 [R3]/ASM-2120) is computed symmetrically over the sampled members union identity, preserving exchangeability and the calibrated Monte-Carlo randomization p. The binding gate value is unchanged: C-SHUF = p <= 0.05.
assumptions.rationale: Without a pre-pinned large-orbit rule, the runner would face an 8.8M-member enumeration or an ad-hoc sampling choice at run time — exactly the kind of unpinned joint the R2-1/R3-1 reviews rejected; fixing the estimator, B, seed discipline, and frame symmetry now keeps the C-SHUF p calibrated at any inventory size.
assumptions.backing_ref: engine-inference-under-typing.md §E2b.5 item 6, §2.3 [R2/R3], §4 item 1; ASM-2114 (orbit + existing MC extension rule), ASM-2120 (A_union invariance argument)

assumptions.claim: EXPECTED O2 HEADROOM OF THE SELECTION (a bound, not a yield claim): by the ASM-2177 cell-space arithmetic (a phys-restricted synset admits exactly 1 fresh anomaly cell — (synset, abst, wn-something); an abst-restricted synset admits 2 — (synset, phys, wn-somebody/wn-something)), the selection's structural fresh-O2 bound is 20 cells spanning all 10 lemmas (phys-restricted: add 1, bring 2, fight 1, leave 2, run 2; abst-restricted: conduct 2, cry 2, produce 2, run 2, shape 2, sing 2). Realizing any of them requires SemCor H1 donor objects on the violating side under the #29-admitted construct, which is unknown until the pre-freeze extraction; the RESOLUTION PATH is the ASM-2256 KILL-e1 recount at $0. If the recount still fails under the admitted construct, the freeze stops again and that stop is the honest E2b result. CAVEAT carried from §E2b.7: the same agent authored E2b-SEL and saw its output in one session; constants were fixed in the committed script before the first run, cite precedents rather than per-lemma fits, the relaxation ladder went unused, and any post-hoc constant change is a new selection requiring a new ASM — the residual is disclosed, not denied.
assumptions.rationale: Separating the provable bound (20 fresh cells exist in cell-space, third-party-licensed this time) from the empirical unknown (donor availability) states exactly what E2b buys — licensing authority on sortally differentiated lemmas — without promising a recount outcome the design cannot know.
assumptions.resolution_path: Resolved by the E2b re-extraction + pilot run on the fresh unseen holdout; the projection is discharged by the measured O2/DIST-SPAN cell counts at pilot.

assumptions.claim: WHAT E2B DOES NOT DECIDE OR LICENSE: (a) it does not adopt the VerbNet-defeasible (or any) O2 anomaly-gold construct — #29 remains the maintainer's, and the E2a caveats carry verbatim (VN-defeasible and H2 gold sets are disjoint at the holdout margin; adoption would REPLACE, not refine; defeasible gold is presumptive and needs the E1-named ~30-item human spot-audit if admitted); (b) it does not change any endpoint, PASS gate, kill criterion, or claim-ladder sentence — E2b only feeds the existing rules a frame in which O2 CAN be populated by a third-party-licensed construct; (c) it licenses no sentence about kernel value: any eventual E2b-frame result is reported as a sortally-enriched capability test under the steering synthesis's framing cap, and the sing F4(b) parse-artifact disclosure plus the tag_cnt disclosure travel with the record; (d) NO feasibility conclusion on CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY is stated or implied by this block, the §E2b addendum, the selection artifacts, or the staged corpus.
assumptions.rationale: Pre-registering the negative space — what the extension does not decide — is what keeps a large authored artifact from quietly becoming evidence; every affirmative reading remains gated behind the maintainer's construct decision, the $0 recount, the re-run pilot, and the registered run.
assumptions.backing_ref: engine-inference-under-typing.md §E2b.6-§E2b.7; ASM-2178 caveats; poc/engine-inference/e0-kill-steering-synthesis.md (framing cap, maintainer-owned amendment)
